1.sql: SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, objid, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%drammen%';

2.sql: SELECT objid, gjentaksintervall, omrade FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal WHERE gjentaksintervall = 200;

3.sql: SELECT objid, bygningsnummer, bygningid, kommunenummer, representasjonspunkt FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning WHERE kommunenummer = '3301';

4.sql: SELECT objid, kartleggingsomradeid, kartleggingsomradenavn, omrade FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.kartleggingsomrade;

1.description: get Drammen municipality geometry and kommunenummer

3.description: reduce 200-year flood zones to those intersecting the Drammen municipality geometry

4.description: get buildings in Drammen municipality by kommunenummer

5.description: find buildings that intersect the municipality's 200-year flood zones

6.description: get quick-clay hazard polygons (kartleggingsomrade) for the area (small national layer)

7.description: compute nearest quick-clay zone and distance for each flooded building

8.description: collapse to one row per building using MIN(distance_m) to deduplicate

9.description: sort buildings by distance to quick-clay ascending
